name: pdf-suite-mcp
description: Comprehensive MCP server for PDF operations — 37 tools for reading, creating, merging, splitting, watermarking, stamping, form filling, redacting, searching, comparing, and more. Built on pdf-lib and unpdf. No cloud, no API key.
long_description: A comprehensive, fully local MCP server for PDF operations. 37 tools covering reading and searching text, creating from text or images, page manipulation (merge, split, rotate, reorder, crop, N-up), overlays (watermark, stamp, page numbers, headers/footers), forms (read and fill), annotation and redaction, metadata, optimization (compress, flatten, validate, repair), comparing two PDFs, and embedding attachments. Built on pdf-lib and unpdf. No cloud, no API key.

tools.name: pdf_read_text
tools.description: Extract text content from a PDF file. Can extract from all pages or specific pages. Works with text-based PDFs (not scan

tools.name: pdf_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a PDF: page count, file size, metadata (title, author, dates), form field count, and page

tools.name: pdf_create
tools.description: Create a new PDF from text. Supports auto word-wrapping, pagination, bold/italic, configurable fonts, margins, page size

tools.name: pdf_images_to_pdf
tools.description: Convert one or more images (PNG/JPG) into a PDF. Each image becomes a page, scaled to fit while maintaining aspect ratio

tools.name: pdf_merge
tools.description: Merge multiple PDF files into a single PDF. Pages are combined in the order listed.

tools.name: pdf_split
tools.description: Split a PDF into multiple files — either individual pages or custom page ranges.

tools.name: pdf_rotate
tools.description: Rotate pages by 90, 180, or 270 degrees clockwise.

tools.name: pdf_delete_pages
tools.description: Remove specific pages from a PDF.

tools.name: pdf_extract_pages
tools.description: Extract specific pages into a new PDF.

tools.name: pdf_reorder
tools.description: Reorder pages. Can also duplicate pages by repeating numbers in the order array.

tools.name: pdf_insert_pages
tools.description: Insert pages from one PDF into another at a specific position. Useful for adding cover pages, appendices, or inserting c

tools.name: pdf_reverse
tools.description: Reverse the page order of a PDF. Useful for fixing scan order or printing back-to-front.

tools.name: pdf_blank_pages
tools.description: Insert blank pages into a PDF at specified positions. Useful for adding separator pages or ensuring chapters start on od

tools.name: pdf_crop
tools.description: Crop pages by setting the visible area (crop box). Trims margins or isolates a region. Coordinates are in points from bo

tools.name: pdf_overlay_pdf
tools.description: Overlay one PDF on top of another. The overlay PDF is drawn on top of the base PDF pages. Perfect for adding letterheads

tools.name: pdf_page_layout
tools.description: Arrange multiple PDF pages onto single sheets in N-up layouts. Puts 2 or 4 source pages onto each output page side-by-si

tools.name: pdf_watermark
tools.description: Add a diagonal text watermark across PDF pages. The text is properly centered regardless of rotation angle.

tools.name: pdf_page_numbers
tools.description: Add page numbers to every page. Supports various positions, custom prefix/suffix, and starting number.

tools.name: pdf_add_text
tools.description: Add text at a specific position on a PDF page. Supports multi-line text (use \n). Coordinates are in points from bottom-

tools.name: pdf_add_image
tools.description: Add an image (PNG/JPG) at a position on a page. Aspect ratio is preserved when only width or height is given.

tools.name: pdf_header_footer
tools.description: Add headers and/or footers with dynamic placeholders: {page} for current page, {pages} for total.

tools.name: pdf_stamp
tools.description: Apply a styled business stamp (like a rubber stamp) to PDF pages. Pre-configured styles for common stamps, or create cus

tools.name: pdf_sign
tools.description: Add a signature image to a PDF with smart positioning. Simplified alternative to pdf_add_image for signing documents.

tools.name: pdf_redact
tools.description: VISUAL-ONLY redaction: draws opaque rectangles over regions on PDF pages. WARNING: This does NOT remove the underlying t

tools.name: pdf_highlight
tools.description: Add translucent highlight boxes over regions on PDF pages — like using a highlighter pen. Great for marking important se

tools.name: pdf_draw
tools.description: Draw shapes on PDF pages: rectangles (filled or outlined), lines, and circles/ellipses. Useful for annotations, diagrams

tools.name: pdf_form_read
tools.description: Read all form fields from a PDF. Returns each field's name, type (Text, CheckBox, Dropdown, OptionList, RadioGroup), cur

tools.name: pdf_form_fill
tools.description: Fill form fields in a PDF by name. Supports text fields, checkboxes ("true"/"false"), dropdowns, option lists, and radio

tools.name: pdf_set_metadata
tools.description: Set or update PDF document metadata fields: title, author, subject, keywords, creator, and producer. Only specified fiel

tools.name: pdf_decrypt
tools.description: Remove password protection from an encrypted PDF. Requires the correct password. Saves an unencrypted copy that can be o

tools.name: pdf_search
tools.description: Search for text in a PDF. Returns all matches with page numbers and surrounding context. Supports plain text and regex s

tools.name: pdf_compare
tools.description: Compare the text content of two PDFs page by page. Reports which pages are identical, which differ, and shows a summary

tools.name: pdf_flatten
tools.description: Flatten a PDF — converts all form fields and annotations into static page content. Fields become non-editable. Useful fo

tools.name: pdf_compress
tools.description: Attempt to reduce PDF file size by rebuilding the document structure. Copies all pages to a fresh PDF (dropping orphaned

tools.name: pdf_validate
tools.description: Validate a PDF file — checks if it can be parsed, reports page count, metadata, form fields, and any structural issues.

tools.name: pdf_repair
tools.description: Attempt to repair a damaged or malformed PDF by loading it with lenient parsing, copying all recoverable pages to a clea

tools.name: pdf_attach
tools.description: Embed one or more files as attachments inside a PDF. Attached files travel with the PDF and can be extracted by PDF read
